backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend types (Player, UserProfile, Mission, Skill, etc.) and game logic including combat, daily tasks, custom tasks, cheat store purchases, leaderboard, and access control for a gamified productivity app.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented PWA features (manifest, icons, service worker, meta tags) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, covering pages, components, hooks, styles, and configuration for the CRYONEX app.
frontend/.ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration defining HTTP response headers (Content-Type, Cache-Control) for all static asset types including service worker, HTML, manifest, PWA icons, fonts, JS, and CSS.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point for the frontend (content is empty in the provided snippet).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full PWA setup including manifest link, Apple PWA meta tags, theme-color, favicon references, Inter font, and conditional service worker registration that skips draft environments.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for CRYONEX defining name, display mode, colors, orientation, categories, and a full icon set from 72×72 to 512×512 including maskable variants.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker for the Cryonex app that pre-caches static assets on install, cleans up old caches on activate, and implements stale-while-revalidate and cache-first strategies for API and static asset fetches. Draft environment detection bypasses all caching.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that manages authentication state via Internet Identity, handles actor/profile initialization with timeouts and retries, and routes between screens like dashboard, missions, stats, and profile.
frontend/src/components/auth/Initializat: Error UI component displayed when app initialization fails, offering retry and cache-clearing options with expandable technical details and special messaging for draft environments.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a spinner during processing and toggling between sign-in and sign-out states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/DailyT: Dashboard section that displays AI-recommended daily tasks, allows marking them complete for rewards, and auto-refreshes task data at midnight UTC.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/DateCa: Small display component that shows the current device date using the useDeviceDate hook with a calendar icon.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/RankIn: Modal dialog that displays the user's current rank and a full rank progression table based on level tiers from E Rank Hunter up to Shadow Monarch.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/RealTi: Small display component that shows a live-updating clock using the useRealTimeClock hook with a clock icon.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application shell with a fixed header, collapsible sidebar navigation, and offline indicator. Renders nav items for all app screens and handles mobile menu toggling.
frontend/src/components/layout/OfflineIn: Fixed top banner that displays an offline warning with a WifiOff icon when the user loses network connectivity, using the useOnlineStatus hook.
frontend/src/components/missions/CustomM: Form component for creating custom missions with title, description, XP, and coin reward fields, including client-side validation and submission via the useCreateUserMission mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/profile/AccountD: Confirmation alert dialog for permanent account deletion that lists all data to be removed and exposes Cancel and Delete actions via callback props.
frontend/src/components/profile/Personal: Multi-step dialog questionnaire that walks the user through five radio-button questions and submits all answers via the useSubmitQuestionnaireAnswers mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: Modal dialog for first-time profile creation that collects a nickname and calls the useInitializeProfile mutation to set up the user's account.
frontend/src/components/stats/StatsRadar: Recharts-based radar chart component that visualizes an array of bigint stat values against named axes with a sci-fi cyan color scheme.
frontend/src/components/tasks/CustomTask: A form component for creating custom tasks with title, XP points (1–100), and attribute points (1–10) inputs, using increment/decrement buttons and submitting via the useCreateCustomTask mutation hook.
Displays a list of custom tasks split into active and completed sections, allowing users to toggle task completion via the useToggleCustomTaskCompletion hook, with loading and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/content/copy.ts: Centralized UI copy/text constants for the entire app, covering sections like auth, dashboard, missions, profile setup, personalization questions, and custom tasks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeviceDate.ts: Custom hook that returns the current date as a DD/MM/YY string and updates it automatically at midnight each day.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts: Custom hook that tracks browser network connectivity by listening to online/offline window events and returns a boolean isOnline value.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the app's backend interactions, including profile management, missions, skills, custom tasks, leaderboard, and mutations with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useRealTimeClock.ts: Custom React hook that returns the current time as a formatted HH:MM:SS string, updating every second via setInterval.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a sci-fi themed light/dark color system, and applies a fixed background image with glass-overlay utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CheatStorePage.tsx: Page component that displays purchasable cheat/reward items using credits, showing daily purchase limits and allowing users to buy items via the purchaseCheat mutation.
frontend/src/pages/CustomTasksPage.tsx: Page component that renders a form to create custom tasks and a list of existing custom tasks, using copy strings from the content module.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the user's profile, rank badge with avatar, stats radar chart, XP progress, credits, real-time clock, and a quick custom task form.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, login button, and a four-card feature grid highlighting the app's core value propositions.
frontend/src/pages/LeaderboardPage.tsx: Leaderboard page that fetches and displays ranked user entries with podium styling for the top three, rank-colored badges, and highlights the current user's row.
frontend/src/pages/MissionLogPage.tsx: Displays a daily mission log page showing today's progress summary including completed tasks, missions, XP earned, and coins earned by fetching user profile and daily task recommendation data.
frontend/src/pages/MissionsPage.tsx: Renders the missions page with daily, repeatable, and custom user missions, supporting mission completion, custom mission creation via a form, and deletion with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSettingsPage.t: Profile settings page allowing users to view their profile info, edit their username, log out, and delete their account with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/SkillsPage.tsx: Skills page that displays general and discipline skills grouped by category, showing unlock status and allowing users to unlock skills based on level and stat requirements.
frontend/src/pages/StatsPage.tsx: Stats allocation page where users can distribute unspent stat points across 13 named attributes, with a radar chart visualization and pending allocation tracking before confirming changes.
frontend/src/utils/cacheControl.ts: Utility functions for managing service worker caches and registrations, including detection of the draft environment and automatic cache clearing/service worker unregistration on that domain.
frontend/src/utils/rankUtils.ts: Utility function that maps a player's level to a rank title (E through Shadow Monarch) with associated color and special flag metadata.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing features, architectural notes, and PWA image/icon requirements for the CRYONEX sci-fi themed app.
